title: Modern Industrial Routers
description: Modular Routers upgrades that will make any energy modules transfer Modern Industrialization EU energy instead of FE
body:
This mod adds [Modular Routers](https://modrinth.com/mod/modular-routers) upgrades that will make any energy modules transfer [Modern Industrialization](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-industrialization) EU energy instead of FE:

LV Upgrade - transfer LV tier energy
MV Upgrade - transfer MV tier energy
HV Upgrade - transfer HV tier energy
EV Upgrade - transfer EV tier energy
Superconductor Upgrade - transfer Superconductor tier energy

The EU Upgrades are mutually exclusive, and are also exclusive with the built-in FE energy upgrade.

Each upgrade has a transfer limit that can be increased by putting in more upgrades or by using speed upgrades to increase the router tick rate (behaviour similar to normal Energy upgrades).

![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b0d512c9aad778211972530d8a777b567b1c464.png)

![UI with installed upgrade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df54a705a9925c6637a78c54f7b387e6e87b0511_0.webp)

![In-World transfer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22fd30ae630e63488e2a1034f6d82e7f195833dc_0.webp)
